paper_title: CTRL: A Conditional Transformer Language Model for Controllable Generation

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **conditional transformer language models** with control codes that explicitly specify domains, entities, relationships, dates, and task-specific behaviors during generation. Unlike prior work, these codes enable direct human-guided control over generated text without requiring task-specific fine-tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia, Books, Reviews, Amazon Reviews Data, OpenWebText, WMT translations, News articles, Multilingual Wikipedias (German/Spanish/French), MRQA shared task questions, Explanation datasets, Reddit subreddit data
raw_extraction.application: Controlled text generation, customizable content creation, domain-specific language modeling, and applications requiring precise entity/relation control
raw_extraction.research_problem: Controllable text generation with explicit user-defined constraints
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with conditional control codes
